allow: Bash(node -e "const ts = require\('typescript'\); const prog = ts.createProgram\(['app/layout.tsx'], {strict:true, jsx: ts.JsxEmit.ReactJSX, moduleResolution: ts.ModuleResolutionKind.Bundler}\); const diags = ts.getPreEmitDiagnostics\(prog\); diags.forEach\(d => console.log\(ts.flattenDiagnosticMessageText\(d.messageText, '\\n'\), 'at line', d.file?.getLineAndCharacterOfPosition\(d.start || 0\).line + 1\)\);")
